---
title: "Mrs Durndell"
---

## Mrs Durndell

### Description

an inhabitant of Otterbourne (24 Sept 1846), either a schoolmistress or a parent

### Biography

Perhaps Maria Durndell (b. 1824/5) wife of James Durndell, of Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
